system.Text:
__When you make or obtain repairs for you assets or other equipment, envision the situation and roll. If you...

  * Do it yourself or direct others: Roll +wits.
  * Obtain the services of an expert in a community: Roll +heart.

On a __hit__, you gain repair points as appropriate to the situation, per the table below. Additionally, you may @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (hold) and exchange each -1 of supply for 1 extra repair point (up to 3 points).

Situation     | Strong Hit | Weak Hit
--------------|--------------|---------
Community Expert | 6 points | 4 points
Safe Refuge | 4 points | 2 points
Underway | 3 points | 1 points
Under Seige | 2 points | 0 points

Spend repair points as follows. Unused points are discarded.

  * Clear the battered impact on an asset: 2 points
  * Fix one broken asset: 2 points
  * Take +1 integrity on a asset: 1 point
  * Take +1 health for a mechanical-based companion: 1 point
  * Robust repair any other equipment or device: 3 points
  * Rudimentary repair of any other equipment or device leaving it with a lingering complication or malfunction: 2 points

On a __miss__, the repairs are not made and the situation worsens. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
